upcoming_text: Upcoming events are announced through email and social media. Each event is unique — inquire below to be added to the list or ask about what's coming next.

offerings.title: Sound Bath
offerings.description: Crystal bowls and resonant instruments create a deeply restorative and immersive listening experience.

offerings.title: Guided Breathwork
offerings.description: Live guided breathwork with personalized healing music to support emotional and energetic release.

offerings.title: Women's Circles
offerings.description: A facilitated gathering for reflection, conversation, meditation, and shared support.

offerings.title: Cacao Ceremonies
offerings.description: A heart-centered gathering using ceremonial cacao, meditation, and guided reflection.

offerings.title: Breathwork & Journaling
offerings.description: Guided breathwork followed by reflective writing to process insights and emotions.

offerings.title: Somatic Experiences
offerings.description: Immersive somatic and sound journeys for deepening sensory awareness and body connection.

private_para1: Private experiences are available for small groups, executive teams, and organizations seeking a restorative or reflective experience. These can be designed as private workshops, leadership reset sessions, or retreat-style experiences that support mental clarity, stress regulation, and deeper connection.
private_para2: Past private work has included women's retreats, men's retreat breathwork, corporate wellness, and multi-hour immersive experiences.
